# CPI Presentation Template Guide
## PowerPoint / Google Slides — Compliant Slide Deck Creation

---

## SLIDE DIMENSIONS
- **Standard (16:9):** 33.87 cm × 19.05 cm | 1920 × 1080 px — **preferred**
- **Standard (4:3):** 25.4 cm × 19.05 cm | 1280 × 960 px — only if required by venue

---

## MASTER SLIDE THEME (PowerPoint / Google Slides)

### Background Colors:
- **Primary slides:** White `#FFFFFF`
- **Cover slide:** CPI Purple `#41273B` or Full-bleed photo with overlay
- **Section dividers:** CPI Red `#D91E4D`
- **Closing slide:** CPI Purple `#41273B` or CPI Red `#D91E4D`

### Font Settings:
- **Title font:** Arial Bold (all slides)
- **Body font:** Arial Regular
- **Fallback:** Calibri if Arial unavailable
- **All text:** Left-aligned (except cover titles — can be center)

---

## SLIDE TEMPLATES

### SLIDE 1 — Cover / Title
```
LAYOUT: Full-bleed photo OR solid CPI Purple (#41273B)
TOP-LEFT: CPI Logo (white reversed version), height ~1.2cm
BOTTOM PANEL: CPI Red rectangle (#D91E4D), 6cm height, full width
  Inside panel:
    - Presentation Title: Arial Bold, 28–36pt, White
    - Subtitle / Program: Arial Regular, 18pt, White
    - Date | Location: Arial Regular, 14pt, White at 80% opacity
TAGLINE STRIP (optional, 1cm above bottom): 
    "Empower communities. Transform lives." — Arial, 11pt, White
```

### SLIDE 2 — Table of Contents / Agenda
```
LAYOUT: White background
HEADER BAR: CPI Red, full-width, 2cm height
  Title "AGENDA" or "CONTENTS": Arial Bold, 22pt, White
CONTENT: Numbered list
  Arial Bold 16pt (CPI Purple) for section numbers
  Arial Regular 16pt (CPI Black) for section names
SIDE ACCENT: Thin vertical line, CPI Red, left edge of content area
```

### SLIDE 3–N — Content Slides (Standard)
```
LAYOUT: White background
HEADER BAR: CPI Red (#D91E4D), full-width, 1.5cm height
  Slide Title: Arial Bold, 20–22pt, White, left-aligned, vertically centered
  Slide number: Arial Regular, 10pt, White, right-aligned in header bar
CONTENT AREA: 
  Body text: Arial Regular, 16–18pt, CPI Black #2D2926
  Bullet points: Use • (round bullet), CPI Red, 14pt
  Sub-bullets: Indent 0.5cm, Arial Regular, 14pt, CPI Purple #41273B
FOOTER BAR: Very thin (0.3cm), CPI Purple, full-width
  CPI Logo: left side, white reversed, height 0.8cm
  www.cpintl.org: right side, Arial Regular 8pt, White
```

### Section Divider Slide
```
LAYOUT: Solid CPI Red (#D91E4D) background
SECTION NUMBER: Arial Light, 80pt, White at 20% opacity, top-left
SECTION TITLE: Arial Bold, 36–42pt, White, centered or left-aligned
SHORT DESCRIPTION: Arial Regular, 18pt, White at 80% opacity
CPI Logo: bottom-right, white reversed, height 1cm
```

### Photo / Story Slide
```
LAYOUT: Left 50% = full-bleed photo | Right 50% = white panel
PHOTO: CPI-approved photography, no overlay needed
RIGHT PANEL:
  Pull quote or headline: Arial Bold, 20pt, CPI Purple
  Body: Arial Regular, 14pt, CPI Black
  Attribution: Arial Italic, 12pt, CPI Mid Grey
  CPI Logo: bottom-right of panel
```

### Data / Statistics Slide
```
LAYOUT: White background
HEADER BAR: CPI Purple (#41273B), same as standard
STAT BOXES (3–4 per slide):
  Background: CPI Red #D91E4D
  Number: Arial Bold, 48pt, White
  Label: Arial Regular, 12pt, White
  Box size: ~6cm × 5cm
  Spacing: Equal gaps between boxes
SUPPORTING TEXT: Arial Regular, 13pt, CPI Black
SOURCE NOTE: Arial Regular, 9pt, CPI Mid Grey
```

### Chart / Infographic Slide
```
CHART COLORS (in order of use):
  1. CPI Red #D91E4D
  2. CPI Purple #41273B
  3. CPI Blue #4298B5
  4. CPI Purple Secondary #615E9B
  5. CPI Mid Grey #948794
  6. CPI Light Grey #D0C4C5

CHART TITLE: Arial Bold, 14pt, CPI Purple
AXIS LABELS: Arial Regular, 10pt, CPI Black
DATA LABELS: Arial Bold, 10pt, White (on colored bars) or CPI Black (on white)
LEGEND: Arial Regular, 10pt, CPI Black
SOURCE: Arial Regular, 9pt, CPI Mid Grey, bottom-right
```

### Map / Geographic Slide
```
MAP BACKGROUND: Neutral/grey basemap
CPI PROGRAM AREAS: CPI Red dots/polygons
  - Primary: CPI Red #D91E4D, filled circle
  - Secondary: CPI Purple #41273B, outline circle
CALLOUT BOXES: White with CPI Red border, Arial Bold 10pt
LEGEND: White box, Arial Regular 10pt
CPI Logo: top-left or bottom-right
```

### Closing / Thank You Slide
```
LAYOUT: CPI Purple (#41273B) full background
CPI Logo: top-center OR top-left, white version
MAIN TEXT: 
  "Thank you." or "Questions?" — Arial Bold, 48pt, White
CONTACT BLOCK:
  [Name, Title] — Arial Bold, 16pt, White
  [email] — Arial Regular, 14pt, CPI Light Grey
  [phone] — Arial Regular, 14pt, CPI Light Grey
  www.cpintl.org — Arial Regular, 14pt, CPI Red (visible on purple)
TAGLINE: Arial Medium, 14pt, White, bottom-center
  "Empower communities. Transform lives."
```

---

## SLIDE CONTENT RULES

### Text Density:
- **Max words per slide:** 50 (content slides) | 20 (visual/stat slides)
- **Max bullet points:** 5 per slide
- **Max sub-bullets:** 2 levels deep
- **Never:** Full paragraphs on slides — use bullet points or split into multiple slides

### Font Sizes:
| Element | Min Size | Max Size |
|---------|----------|----------|
| Slide title (in header bar) | 18pt | 24pt |
| Body text (bullets) | 14pt | 18pt |
| Sub-bullets | 12pt | 14pt |
| Stat numbers | 36pt | 60pt |
| Caption / footnote | 8pt | 10pt |
| Footer text | 7pt | 9pt |

### Image Rules:
- Always use high-resolution photos (min 1920px wide for full-bleed)
- Credit photographer in caption: *Photo: [Name] / CPI*
- No clip art or generic stock photos
- Apply CPI color overlay when needed for text legibility

---

## PRESENTATION FILE NAMING
```
CPI-BGD-[AudienceCode]-[Topic]-[YYYYMM]-v[Version].pptx

Examples:
CPI-BGD-DONOR-QuarterlyBrief-202604-v1.pptx
CPI-BGD-HEALTH-MonthlyTeamMeeting-202605-v2.pptx
CPI-BGD-YPSA-CoordinationBrief-202603-v1.pptx
CPI-BGD-HEALTHSECTOR-ProgramUpdate-202604-v1.pptx
```

---

## QUICK CHECKLIST BEFORE SHARING

- [ ] CPI logo visible on cover and every slide footer
- [ ] No unapproved colors used
- [ ] All fonts are Arial (or Raleway if designed version)
- [ ] Photo credits included where applicable
- [ ] No text smaller than 8pt
- [ ] Slide numbering is consistent
- [ ] File name follows naming convention
- [ ] Spell-checked and reviewed
- [ ] Exported as PDF as well (for non-editable distribution)
